promoted_facts.fact: BKC data ownership: BKC is sole owner of all data generated by Additional Digital Systems and retains all net profits from data monetization to third parties
AI/Generative AI trade secret restriction: franchisees cannot use trade secrets for ML, AI training, or input into generative AI without prior approval
Minimum operating hours: 6AM-12AM Mon-Sat, 7AM-12AM Sunday, 52 weeks/year
Successor FA requires 4-year advance notice of intent to exercise option
Carrols acquisition total consideration was $648M (including $543M cash + $15M settlement of pre-existing balances + $90M fair value of existing 15% interest)
RBI valuation allowance surged from $194M (2022) to $1,563M (2023) to $1,588M (2024) on deferred tax assets
BK Foundation contribution mandatory: $1,000/year/restaurant (purchase or in-restaurant fundraising)
Food Safety Incident: written notice to BKC within 24 hours of any investigation, violation, or failing score
Delivery Restaurant franchisees waive all rights to dispute development of another restaurant
RBI commitments: IT/telecom $84M over 5 years, advertising $192M (mostly within 12 months), equipment $23M over 4 years
